Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 1) Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 2) Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 3) Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 in the variant containing the longest sequence of reviewer assignment attempts
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 4) Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-AE Assign Reviewers in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed does not follow within 7 days
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 5) Total resolution time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 defined as the duration until the next distinct reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 6) Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due in variants exhibiting delayed reviewer selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 7) Average time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and the subsequent Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 when SW-Reviewer Agreed is not observed in between
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 8) Elapsed time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in complete review cycles that include at least one instance of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 9) Time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 measured as the interval between its occurrence and the immediately preceding SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 10) Average time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 compared to the time it takes SW-Reviewer Declined to occur after the same reminder
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 11) Total time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept versus those leading to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 12) Minimum time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants involving multiple rounds of major revision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 13) Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer No Response in traces where no further agreement occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 14) Average cycle time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 calculated from its timestamp to the timestamp of the next definitive reviewer outcome (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1: 15) Elapsed time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer Unavailable in variants where reviewer unavailability interrupts the assignment process
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'
